changeSet.author: codex
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `medical_knowledge_source` ( `id` BIGINT NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT, `account` VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL COMMENT '创建人账号', `source_name` VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL COMMENT '来源名称', `source_type` TINYINT NOT NULL COMMENT '来源类型: 1-本地路径 2-上传文件', `file_format` VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL COMMENT '文件格式', `file_size` BIGINT DEFAULT 0 COMMENT '文件大小', `file_hash` VARCHAR(64) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '文件哈希', `local_path` VARCHAR(1000) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '本地路径', `storage_path` VARCHAR(1000) NOT NULL COMMENT '服务端存储路径', `parse_status` TINYINT DEFAULT 1 COMMENT '解析状态: 1-待执行 2-执行中 3-成功 4-失败', `extract_status` TINYINT DEFAULT 1 COMMENT '提取状态: 1-待执行 2-执行中 3-成功 4-失败', `chapter_count` INT DEFAULT 0 COMMENT '章节数', `chunk_count` INT DEFAULT 0 COMMENT '文本块数', `knowledge_count` INT DEFAULT 0 COMMENT '知识条目数', `error_message` VARCHAR(2000) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '异常信息', `create_time` DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP COMMENT '创建时间', `update_time` DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP COMMENT '更新时间', `is_delete` TINYINT DEFAULT 0 COMMENT '删除标记', PRIMARY KEY (`id`), KEY `idx_medical_knowledge_source_account` (`account`), KEY `idx_medical_knowledge_source_status` (`parse_status`, `extract_status`) ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_general_ci COMMENT='医疗知识库来源表';

changeSet.author: codex
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `medical_knowledge_task` ( `id` BIGINT NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT, `source_id` BIGINT NOT NULL COMMENT '来源ID', `task_type` TINYINT NOT NULL COMMENT '任务类型: 1-导入提取 2-重新提取', `task_status` TINYINT DEFAULT 1 COMMENT '任务状态: 1-待执行 2-执行中 3-成功 4-失败', `model_name` VARCHAR(100) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '模型名称', `prompt_version` VARCHAR(50) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '提示词版本', `result_message` VARCHAR(2000) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '结果消息', `start_time` DATETIME DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '开始时间', `finish_time` DATETIME DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '结束时间', `create_time` DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP COMMENT '创建时间', `update_time` DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP COMMENT '更新时间', PRIMARY KEY (`id`), KEY `idx_medical_knowledge_task_source` (`source_id`), KEY `idx_medical_knowledge_task_status` (`task_status`) ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_general_ci COMMENT='医疗知识库任务表';

changeSet.author: codex
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `medical_knowledge_chunk` ( `id` BIGINT NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT, `source_id` BIGINT NOT NULL COMMENT '来源ID', `chapter_no` INT DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '章节序号', `chapter_title` VARCHAR(255) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '章节标题', `page_from` INT DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '起始页码', `page_to` INT DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '结束页码', `chunk_no` INT NOT NULL COMMENT '分块序号', `raw_content` LONGTEXT COMMENT '原始内容', `clean_content` LONGTEXT COMMENT '清洗后内容', `content_hash` VARCHAR(64) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '内容哈希', `token_estimate` INT DEFAULT 0 COMMENT '估算token数', `create_time` DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP COMMENT '创建时间', `update_time` DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP COMMENT '更新时间', PRIMARY KEY (`id`), UNIQUE KEY `uk_medical_knowledge_chunk_source_chunk` (`source_id`, `chunk_no`), KEY `idx_medical_knowledge_chunk_source` (`source_id`) ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_general_ci COMMENT='医疗知识库文本分块表';

changeSet.author: codex
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `medical_knowledge_item` ( `id` BIGINT NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT, `source_id` BIGINT NOT NULL COMMENT '来源ID', `item_type` VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL COMMENT '知识类型', `title` VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL COMMENT '标题', `keywords` VARCHAR(1000) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '关键词', `department` VARCHAR(100) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '科室', `summary` TEXT COMMENT '摘要', `content` LONGTEXT COMMENT '知识正文', `structured_data` LONGTEXT COMMENT '结构化数据JSON', `confidence_score` DECIMAL(6,4) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '置信度', `dedup_key` VARCHAR(128) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '去重键', `review_status` TINYINT DEFAULT 0 COMMENT '审核状态', `create_time` DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP COMMENT '创建时间', `update_time` DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP COMMENT '更新时间', `is_delete` TINYINT DEFAULT 0 COMMENT '删除标记', PRIMARY KEY (`id`), KEY `idx_medical_knowledge_item_source` (`source_id`), KEY `idx_medical_knowledge_item_title` (`title`), KEY `idx_medical_knowledge_item_dedup` (`dedup_key`) ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_general_ci COMMENT='医疗知识库条目表';

changeSet.author: codex
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `medical_knowledge_item_ref` ( `id` BIGINT NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT, `knowledge_item_id` BIGINT NOT NULL COMMENT '知识条目ID', `chunk_id` BIGINT NOT NULL COMMENT '文本块ID', `quote_text` TEXT COMMENT '引用原文', `sort_order` INT DEFAULT 1 COMMENT '排序号', `create_time` DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP COMMENT '创建时间', PRIMARY KEY (`id`), KEY `idx_medical_knowledge_item_ref_item` (`knowledge_item_id`), KEY `idx_medical_knowledge_item_ref_chunk` (`chunk_id`) ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_general_ci COMMENT='医疗知识条目引用表';

changeSet.author: codex
changeSet.sql:
INSERT INTO miniapp (name, intro, icon, color, category, tag_type, route, external_link, sort_order, is_delete, create_time, update_time) SELECT '医疗知识库', '导入医疗书籍并由 AI 清洗提取，沉淀为可检索、可溯源的知识条目', 'Reading', '#0F766E', 'AI工具', 'success', '/index/medicalKnowledge', NULL, 10, 0, NOW(), NOW() FROM DUAL WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM miniapp WHERE name = '医疗知识库');
UPDATE miniapp SET intro = '导入医疗书籍并由 AI 清洗提取，沉淀为可检索、可溯源的知识条目', icon = 'Reading', color = '#0F766E', category = 'AI工具', tag_type = 'success', route = '/index/medicalKnowledge', external_link = NULL, sort_order = 10, is_delete = 0, update_time = NOW() WHERE name = '医疗知识库';
